rationale: Interaction tasks should start with structured page state, not screenshots.
Reading tasks should prefer cheap textual context before any visual artifact.

input_summary.expression: (() => ({ innerWidth: window.innerWidth, scrollWidth: document.documentElement.scrollWidth, hasHorizontalOverflow: document.documentElement.scrollWidth > window.innerWidth, heroHeight: document.querySelector('.hero-grid')?.getBoundingClientRect().height, topbarHeight: document.querySelector('.topbar')?.getBoundingClientRect().height, navHeight: document.querySelector('.topnav')?.getBoundingClientRect().height }))()

(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('body *')).map(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(), cls: el.className || '', text: (el.textContent || '').trim().slice(0, 40), left: Math.round(r.left), right: Math.round(r.right), width: Math.round(r.width), overflow: Math.round(r.right - window.innerWidth) }; }).filter(x => x.right > window.innerWidth + 1).sort((a,b) => b.right - a.right).slice(0, 20))()

(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('body *')).map(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(), cls: el.className || '', text: (el.textContent || '').trim().slice(0, 40), left: Math.round(r.left), right: Math.round(r.right), width: Math.round(r.width), overflow: Math.round(r.right - window.innerWidth) }; }).filter(x => x.right > window.innerWidth + 1).sort((a,b) => b.right - a.right).slice(0, 20))()

(() => { const sels=['body','#app','.page-shell','.hero-grid','.hero-copy','.hero-visual']; return Object.fromEntries(sels.map(sel => { const el=document.querySelector(sel); if(!el) return [sel,null]; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); const cs=getComputedStyle(el); return [sel,{width:r.width,left:r.left,right:r.right,marginLeft:cs.marginLeft,marginRight:cs.marginRight,paddingLeft:cs.paddingLeft,paddingRight:cs.paddingRight,boxSizing:cs.boxSizing,display:cs.display}]; })); })()

(() => { const sels=['body','#app','.page-shell','.hero-grid','.hero-copy','.hero-visual']; return Object.fromEntries(sels.map(sel => { const el=document.querySelector(sel); if(!el) return [sel,null]; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); const cs=getComputedStyle(el); return [sel,{width:r.width,left:r.left,right:r.right,marginLeft:cs.marginLeft,marginRight:cs.marginRight,paddingLeft:cs.paddingLeft,paddingRight:cs.paddingRight,boxSizing:cs.boxSizing,display:cs.display}]; })); })()

(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.hero-copy *')).map(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(), cls: el.className || '', text: (el.textContent || '').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ').slice(0,60), width: Math.round(r.width), right: Math.round(r.right), overflow: Math.round(r.right - document.querySelector('.page-shell').getBoundingClientRect().right) }; }).sort((a,b) => b.width - a.width).slice(0,20))()

(() => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.hero-copy *')).map(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return { tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(), cls: el.className || '', text: (el.textContent || '').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ').slice(0,60), width: Math.round(r.width), right: Math.round(r.right), overflow: Math.round(r.right - document.querySelector('.page-shell').getBoundingClientRect().right) }; }).sort((a,b) => b.width - a.width).slice(0,20))()

input_summary.script_preview: const heading = await helpers.text('#title'); await helpers.setValue('#name', 'Ada'); await helpers.click('#btn'); await helpers.waitFor('#delayed', 1000); helpers.assert(await helpers.value('#name') === 'Ada', 'name input should update'); return helpers.json({ heading, name: await helpers.value('#name'), count: await helpers.text('#count'), delayed: await helpers.text('#delayed'), page: helpers.page() });

const heading = await helpers.text('#title'); await helpers.setValue('#name', 'Ada'); await helpers.click('#btn'); await helpers.waitFor('#delayed', 1000); helpers.assert(await helpers.value('#name') === 'Ada', 'name input should update'); return helpers.json({ heading, name: await helpers.value('#name'), count: await helpers.text('#count'), delayed: await helpers.text('#delayed'), page: helpers.page() });
